photography

nature is the best medicine for any kind of disease. i love getting lost in nature and it gives me peace. i collect those memorable clicks that are pleasing to recollect using my canon 700D here.

  • singapore zoo 2019

    i had a solo walk around the beautiful singapore zoo on april 25, 2019 and these are some of my handpicked clicks using 55-250mm lens and canon 700D.
